pricingPreview.subtitle: Per counter, never per seat. Switch tier the moment your operation does — pro-rated, no penalty.

pricing.metaDescription: Free Basic plan, Pro from 250 MAD/mo per counter. No commitment, no hidden fees. Compare every feature.
pricing.heroSubtitle: Start free, move to Pro when your operation calls for it. Three prices per plan: monthly, yearly (-25%), or 24-month (-50%). No commitment, no hidden fees.
pricing.matrixSubtitle: Everything included in every plan — no asterisks.
pricing.trustTitle: Built, hosted, and run in Morocco.
pricing.trustSubtitle: Hundreds of operators across the Kingdom run their counter on Caisse Manager.
pricing.faqBody: Can't see your question? <link>Ask the team</link> — we typically reply within an hour during business hours.
pricing.heroHeadline: Pricing built for the way you operate.
pricing.heroBody: Per counter, never per seat. Start free on a single till, scale to multi-store with custom integrations — and switch tier the moment your operation does.
pricing.plansReassure: All prices in MAD, excluding VAT. Priced per counter, pro-rated when you add or remove a station. Hardware sold separately; Wafasalaf financing available.

hardware.body: Pair your POS terminal, printer, drawer, and scanner with the software. Hardware is sold separately — pay upfront or spread the cost over 24 months with Wafasalaf financing. Every unit ships with a 12-month warranty and on-site support across Morocco.

pricing.compareBody: The full catalogue. Find the smallest plan that says yes to everything you need.
pricing.finalTitle: Start the trial. We'll sort the rest.
pricing.finalBody: Four quick fields and a guided setup call — that's the whole onboarding.

faqs.a1: No. Setup and onboarding are included in every plan. Our team imports your menu, pairs your hardware, and trains your staff in a guided session — typically live within the hour.
faqs.q2: Do I have to commit to a contract?
faqs.a2: Monthly billing is the default and you can cancel anytime. The Save 25% yearly and Save 50% 24-month options unlock larger discounts — neither plan locks you in beyond the term you choose.
faqs.a3: Yes — upgrade or downgrade at any moment from the Backoffice. Billing is pro-rated on changes; no penalty.
faqs.q4: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.a4: Bank transfer, card via CMI for in-country billing, and Wafasalaf 24-month financing on hardware bundles. Enterprise accounts can be invoiced quarterly or annually.
faqs.q5: Do I need to buy hardware from you?
faqs.a5: No. Caisse Manager runs on the hardware we sell and on most existing Android-based POS terminals. Hardware is sold separately; 24-month Wafasalaf financing is available to spread the cost.
faqs.q6: What if my counter count changes month to month?
faqs.a6: Per-counter billing is pro-rated. Add a counter for a busy month, remove it for the slow one — your invoice tracks the actual count in use.
faqs.a7: All sales, inventory, and customer data sync over TLS to our hosted backoffice. Enterprise plans include extended retention, SSO, and a contractual uptime SLA. We process data inside the EU; Morocco-hosting on request.

labels.ctaTrySimDesc: Open a till pre-configured for {activity} in seconds — no signup.

cafe.title: Cafés
cafe.standfirst: Counter to cup, in seconds. Built for the morning rush, the casual lunch, and the regulars who already know what they want.
workflow: One-tap modifiers — size, milk, extra shot — without slowing the line.
Loyalty redeems at the till; baristas don't manage two systems.
Recipe-aware stock deducts beans, milk, and cups on every sale.
ecosystem: QR Menu for table-service flips dine-in into a kiosk ordering experience.
Mobile Application lets the manager check sales from anywhere.
Customer Display turns the counter into a brand surface.
cafe.scaling: Single café? Run it lean. Chain of locations? See every counter's flow from one dashboard.

fast-food.title: Fast food
fast-food.standfirst: Volume without chaos. Combos, modifiers, kitchen tickets — all tuned for peak hour.
workflow: Combo wizard walks customers through main + side + drink in seconds.
Tickets fire to kitchen the moment payment hits.
Receipt printer + cash drawer integration on every counter.
ecosystem: Self-Order Kiosk pulls orders out of the cashier queue.
Online Ordering routes to the same KDS as the counter line.
Mobile Application lets management track speed-of-service.
fast-food.scaling: Multi-store quick service runs on the same till logic — every location reports into one Back Office.

dine-in.title: Restaurants
dine-in.standfirst: Fast service, full house. Ring orders, fire to kitchen, take payment — without ever leaving the floor.
workflow: Open orders by table, modify on the fly, split or merge tabs in one tap.
Send to kitchen instantly — no shouting across the line, no lost tickets.
Take payment at the table, cash drawer, or terminal — same workflow.
ecosystem: Kitchen Display routes by station with color-coded urgency.
Customer Display shows the order live as your team rings it.
Payment Terminal docks at the till for tap-and-go.
Online Ordering and QR Menu drop straight into the same kitchen queue.
dine-in.scaling: One restaurant or forty — Back Office consolidates every till's revenue, stock, and staff hours into one console.

bakery.title: Bakery
bakery.standfirst: Stock that matches the oven. Track every loaf, croissant, and cake from production to till.
workflow: Production runs deduct raw materials; sales deduct finished goods.
Daily prep counts visible at every counter — no over-baking, no shortages.
Batch and expiry tracking for perishable items.
ecosystem: Stock Management knows the recipe behind every product.
Customer Display shows daily specials to the queue.
QR Menu for catering pre-orders.
bakery.scaling: Central kitchen + multiple retail counters? Back Office orchestrates production and distribution.

beauty.title: Beauty & services
beauty.standfirst: Bookings, staff, and till — one app. From walk-ins to standing appointments.
workflow: Calendar view per staff member with drag-and-drop rebooking.
Add services to active appointments; ring through the till at checkout.
Customer history attached to every visit.
ecosystem: Mobile Application turns any phone into a booking terminal.
Customer Display shows the customer's selected services + total.
Stock Management for retail products sold alongside services.
beauty.scaling: Single salon to franchise group — staff schedules, commissions, and inventory all centralized.

barber.title: Barbershops
barber.standfirst: Quick or detailed, every appointment runs in one gesture. Track each barber, each product, each transaction.
workflow: Per-barber calendar with flexible slots and one-tap walk-ins.
Service + retail (oil, wax, comb) on the same check.
Per-barber commissions calculated automatically at end of day.
ecosystem: Mobile Application allows self-service customer booking.
Customer Display shows the service, duration and price before the chair.
Stock Management for retail products sold in the shop.
barber.scaling: A single shop or a multi-city brand — schedules and revenue consolidated in one place.

market.title: Retail
market.standfirst: Inventory you can trust. Sell, restock, transfer between stores — all in one rhythm.
workflow: Barcode scan or product search — both routes lead to the same till.
Live stock counts so the screen never shows what the shelf doesn't have.
Returns, exchanges, and refunds with a one-tap audit trail.
ecosystem: Stock Management with multi-location transfers and low-stock alerts.
Payment Terminal accepts every Moroccan card flavor — CMI included.
Back Office reporting drills from sale to product to supplier.
market.scaling: One store, ten stores, a hundred SKUs or ten thousand — the system grows with the inventory.

topics.setupDesc: First-time install, hardware pairing, and Day One.
topics.hardwareDesc: POS terminals, mobile POS, printers, cash drawers, scanners.
topics.paymentsDesc: Cash, card, mobile, delivery partners, end-of-day.
topics.integrationsDesc: Delivery apps, accounting, and online ordering.
topics.mobileDesc: Cashier mobile POS, ordering app, delivery app.

faqs.setup1A: Most operations are live within an hour of receiving the hardware. Menu import, staff accounts, and printer pairing happen on a guided onboarding call.
faqs.setup2Q: Can I import my menu from another POS?
faqs.setup2A: Yes. Send us a CSV (or a screenshot of your current menu screens) and we'll import categories, items, modifiers, and prices for you before Day One.
faqs.hardware1Q: Do I have to buy hardware from you?
faqs.hardware1A: No. Caisse Manager runs on the hardware we sell and on most Android-based POS terminals. If you already have terminals, we'll check compatibility before you commit.
faqs.hardware2Q: Which printers work with Caisse Manager?
faqs.hardware2A: Any ESC/POS-compatible thermal printer over Ethernet, USB, or Bluetooth. We ship a tested list with onboarding — most Epson, Star, and Xprinter models are plug-and-play.
faqs.payments1A: Caisse Manager integrates with CMI and TPE Mobile for in-store card payments. Settlement happens through your bank — we don't hold funds.
faqs.payments2A: Close Day produces a Z report comparing cash counted to expected, with per-tender breakdowns. Discrepancies surface immediately so they get resolved while the shift is still standing there.
faqs.integrations1Q: Do you integrate with Glovo and Yassir?
faqs.integrations1A: Yes. Direct API integrations route incoming delivery orders straight to your kitchen as if they were dine-in tickets, with the platform's commission and delivery fees handled in your daily reports.
faqs.integrations2Q: Can I export data to my accountant?
faqs.integrations2A: End-of-day exports are downloadable as CSV or Excel. Many of our customers wire them straight into their accounting tool via a Make.com or Zapier flow we'll help you set up.
faqs.backoffice1Q: Can I run multiple locations on one account?
faqs.backoffice1A: Yes. The Backoffice supports unlimited locations with per-location menus, staff, and reports — rolled up into a single multi-store view for owners.
faqs.backoffice2A: Roles: Cashier, Manager, Waiter, Owner. Each role has configurable permissions (discounts, voids, reports, etc). Sensitive actions like discounts can require manager approval at the POS.
faqs.mobile1Q: Is there a customer-facing ordering app?
faqs.mobile1A: Yes. A branded online ordering app comes standard. Your menu, your colors, your domain — your customers order without ever leaving your brand.
faqs.mobile2Q: Does the delivery app work offline?
faqs.mobile2A: Drivers can complete deliveries with intermittent signal — orders sync the moment connectivity returns. Critical operations (mark delivered, take photo proof) all work offline-first.

partnership.metaDescription: Partner with Caisse Manager — referrals, reseller programs, and integrations. We share the upside with the people who bring us counters that grow.
partnership.heroHeadline: Grow the counter ecosystem with us.
partnership.heroBody: Three ways to partner with Caisse Manager — refer, resell, or integrate. Each one shares the upside fairly with the people who help our platform reach the counters that need it.
partnership.tracksTitle: Pick the track that matches how you work.

affiliation.title: Refer a counter, earn on every shift.
affiliation.body: Recurring revenue share on every active subscription you bring in. Best for agencies, consultants, and independent restaurateurs with networks.

reseller.title: Sell the hardware lineup with us.
reseller.body: Authorized reseller pricing on the full Swan / Swift / Heron lineup, plus co-marketing budget once your pipeline is qualified. Built for hardware distributors and IT integrators.

technology.title: Build on top of the API.
technology.body: Deep integrations — delivery platforms, accounting suites, marketing tools. Bring a product our customers already use and we'll wire it into the platform.

partnership.howTitle: Three steps from intro to first payout.

steps.step1Body: Send a short note about your network or product. One email, no forms — we read each one.
steps.step2Body: A 30-minute call to map fit, then access to demo accounts, sales collateral, and your partner manager.
steps.step3Body: Referrals start paying out from the first invoice your client settles. Reseller margins clear monthly.

partnership.finalBody: One email is enough — tell us which track and what you bring. We'll come back within two business days.

careers.metaDescription: Join Caisse Manager — we're building the calmest counter in Morocco. Engineering, design, customer success, and ops roles based in Casablanca.
careers.heroHeadline: Build the calmest counter in Morocco.
careers.heroBody: We're a small team in Casablanca building the POS, kitchen, and back-office system that hundreds of counters across Morocco run their day on. If shipping software that real people use every shift sounds like your kind of work, we'd like to meet you.
careers.lookForTitle: Builders who care about the seventh detail.
careers.lookForBody1: Restaurants and shops run on rhythm. The software they trust has to disappear into that rhythm — no clunky modals, no surprises, no waiting. We hire people who feel that and ship for it.
careers.lookForBody2: Engineering, design, customer success, and operations roles — all hybrid out of our Casablanca office, with calm async rhythms for the deep-work hours.
careers.openTitleClosed: Nothing live this minute — but we always read introductions.
careers.openClosedBody: Send us a note about what you do well and what kind of work you'd want next. If we see a fit — now or in a few months — we'll be in touch.
careers.finalBody: A short intro and your work goes a long way. We read every one.

about.metaDescription: Caisse Manager is built to make the counter feel calmer — fewer screens, faster decisions, a system every shift trusts.
about.heroHeadline: We build the counter we wished we had.
about.heroBody: Caisse Manager started in a single restaurant's kitchen, with a notebook full of frustrations about every POS that had been tried before. It became the thing they actually wanted.
about.visionBody1: Restaurants run on rhythm. Every interruption — a clunky modifier modal, a screen that fights the cashier's hands, a kitchen ticket that prints late — breaks that rhythm. We obsess about removing those interruptions, one screen at a time.
about.visionBody2: POS, kitchen, ordering, delivery, and back-office — designed to behave like one system because, for the team using it, they should.
about.finalBody: Start a free trial. Bring your menu, your team, and your tills.

privacy.title: Privacy.
privacy.intro: A short, plain-language description of what Caisse Manager collects, why we collect it, and how we keep it safe. The full legal policy is being finalized — this page will be updated before public launch.
privacy.p1: When you start a free trial we ask for your full name, brand name, city, and phone number. When you use the platform, we record the operational data your team produces — orders, items, prices, shifts, receipts. We do not collect personal data about the diners or shoppers at your counter unless you choose to enable customer profiles.
privacy.p2: Your lead information is used to set up your account, schedule onboarding, and stay in touch about the product. Your operational data powers the reports and dashboards you see in the Backoffice. We do not sell either to third parties.
privacy.p3: Operational data is stored on encrypted servers in the European Union. Backups are encrypted at rest. Access to production data is limited to a small number of engineers under audit logging.
privacy.p4: You can request a copy of every record we hold about your account, ask us to correct it, or ask us to delete it. Email the support team and we'll respond within five business days.
privacy.p5: Material changes are announced in the Backoffice and via the email address on file at least 30 days before they take effect. Continuing to use the platform after that constitutes acceptance.

terms.title: Terms.
terms.intro: A plain-language summary of the agreement between you and Caisse Manager. The full legal terms are being finalized — this page will be updated before public launch.
terms.p1: Caisse Manager is a software platform for running point-of-sale operations. You agree to use it for its intended purpose, pay for the plan you signed up for, and not abuse the service. We agree to keep the platform running, protect your data, and give reasonable notice before changing the terms.
terms.p2: You are responsible for the actions taken under your account, including those by staff you grant access to. Keep your credentials confidential. Notify us promptly of any unauthorized access.
terms.p3: Plans are billed monthly per active counter, unless you have agreed to annual or custom terms in writing. Pricing changes are announced at least 30 days in advance and apply at the start of the following billing cycle.
terms.p4: You can cancel at any time from the Backoffice. Your service remains active until the end of the current billing period. We can export your operational data on request for up to 90 days after cancellation; after that it is permanently deleted.
terms.p5: Don't use the platform to break the law, infringe on others' rights, or attempt to disrupt the service. We may suspend accounts that do, with notice when possible.
terms.p6: The platform is provided on a best-effort basis. We commit to the uptime SLAs in your plan and will credit downtime accordingly. Beyond that, our liability is capped at the fees paid in the prior 12 months, to the extent permitted by applicable law.
terms.p7: These terms are governed by the laws of the Kingdom of Morocco. Disputes will be resolved in the courts of the city of Casablanca unless we mutually agree otherwise.

legal.metaPrivacyDesc: How Caisse Manager collects, uses, and protects the information you share with us.
legal.metaTermsDesc: The agreement between you and Caisse Manager when you use the platform.

posChrome.exitConfirmBody: This clears the active order and returns you to the marketing site.

cart.emptyBody: Pick a category on the left, then tap a product to start the order.
cart.kitchenHint: Kitchen fires the ticket · payment is taken on customer return

kitchen.emptyAll: No tickets · the line is clean
kitchen.emptyHint: When the cashier fires an order, tickets appear here.

calendar.noBookingsYetBody: The day is open. Schedule a service to fill the calendar.
calendar.bookableHours: {count} hours of bookable time per day.

captions.overview: Real-time performance, alerts, and operational signals.
captions.receipts: Audit trail of every transaction — issue refunds or void here.
captions.products: Catalog management — create, edit, and retire SKUs.
captions.inventory: Stock positions, reorder thresholds, adjustments, and movement history.
captions.bom: Define how each finished good is assembled from raw components.
captions.suppliers: Supplier directory — contacts, lead times, and procurement categories.

overview.salesByHourSubtitle: {count, plural, =0 {No orders today} =1 {1 order today · avg {avg} MAD} other {# orders today · avg {avg} MAD}}

kpi.ordersToday: {count, plural, =1 {1 order today} other {# orders today}}
kpi.attributedOrders: {count, plural, =1 {1 attributed order} other {# attributed orders}}

customerIntel.inBook: {count, plural, =1 {1 customer in book} other {# customers in book}}
customerIntel.repeatRateBody: Of attributed orders this period come from returning customers.
customerIntel.topCustomersEmpty: Attach a customer to an order to populate this leaderboard.

revenueIntel.ordersTodaySuffix: {count, plural, =0 {no orders today} =1 {1 order today} other {# orders today}}
revenueIntel.categoryEmpty: Ring something up to see the category breakdown.

staffPerfPanel.headline: Today on the till
staffPerfPanel.noStaff: No staff seeded for this activity.
staffPerfPanel.noAttribution: Pick the cashier on the till from the ActiveOrder header to start attributing today's sales here.

activityFeed.title: Recent activity
activityFeed.empty: Activity appears here as orders, stock changes, and kitchen events happen.

demoLanding.heading: Pick a POS
demoLanding.subheading: Each template loads a real menu, real stock, a week of receipts, and the workflows specific to that business — so you can ring an order in under thirty seconds.

cafe.tagline: Coffee, pastries, and the quiet morning rush.
cafe.description: Counter-served espresso, fresh pastries, and seasonal cold drinks. Built for fast pickup and dine-in by the window.

fast-food.tagline: Built for the lunch rush — burgers, combos, delivery.
fast-food.description: Burgers, wraps, and combos with delivery handoff to Glovo and other partners. Heavy combo wizard usage; tight kitchen sync.

dine-in.tagline: Tables, courses, and a kitchen that listens.
dine-in.description: Full-service dining with a floor plan, multi-course orders, and table-side modifications. Built around the dine-in flow.

market.tagline: Bread, milk, eggs — and 200 other items, fast.
market.description: Grocery and convenience checkout. Per-item pricing, dense category browsing, no kitchen routing. Built so the line behind the counter keeps moving.

bakery.tagline: Breads, viennoiseries, and the morning queue.
bakery.description: Artisan production rotating through the day — loaves, pastries, signature cakes, and counter coffee. Built for fast pickup and a moving line.

beauty.tagline: Services, treatments, and take-home retail at one till.
beauty.description: Hair, nails, and spa services rung up alongside a real retail shelf — shampoo, masks, polish. The same till that books the chair sells the product.

barber.description: Classic and modern men's grooming — cuts, fades, beard work, and the take-home shelf. Same appointment book as the salon, tuned for the barbershop chair.

fallback.heading: Every Caisse Manager template can be tailored.
fallback.body: Pizzeria, juice bar, ice cream stand, food truck — the engine is the same. Start a trial and we'll wire your menu, stock, and team in one onboarding call.
